summary: An FBI FD-302 report describes a base contractor supervisor and a passenger who observed a large cigar-shaped, metallic bronze object with a bright diamond-white ringed light on one end, hovering and slowly moving east to west above a tree line before disappearing after five to ten seconds. The witness noted no sound, no contrails, and no engine interference, and had never seen anything like it in fifteen years working with military aircraft and drones.
